Meaning.En: Used to introduce a statement that adds contrast or concession to a previous statement.
Meaning.Example: She agreed to help, though she was very busy.

Situation.Vi: Biểu thị sự nhượng bộ hoặc tương phản trong câu, thường đứng sau dấu phẩy hoặc đầu câu.
Situation.En: Used to express contrast or concession, often following a comma or at the beginning of a sentence.

Meaning.En: Used to indicate a contrast with what has just been stated; however.
Meaning.Example: I enjoyed the movie; the ending was a bit slow, though.

Situation.Vi: Dùng ở cuối câu để thêm ý tương phản nhẹ nhàng hoặc khiêm tốn.
Situation.En: Used at the end of a sentence to add a mild contrasting or hedges the statement.
